arts.ttl: Mourinho's Fenerbahce beats Anderlecht 3-0 in Europa League playoff. Porto and Roma square off
arts.sum: Ajax won 2-0 at Union Saint-Gilloise, with 16-year-old Jorthy Mokio netting his side’s second goal. Fenerbahce dominated to beat Anderlecht 3-0 and take a comprehensive lead to Belgium for the second leg next week.

arts.ttl: Porto v Roma, AZ Alkmaar v Galatasaray, Twente v Bodø/Glimt: Europa League – live
arts.sum: Updates from knockout phase playoff first legs Live scoreboard | Read the latest Football Daily Ajax lead in Belgium. A fine, end-to-end move was finished off beautifully by Christian Rasmussen, who clipped a first-time shot into the far corner from 19 yards. It’s all going swimmingly for Jose Mourinho. Youssef En-Nesyri has put Fenerbahce 3-0 ahead with a mighty header from Sebastian Szymanski’s cross. He was about 15 yards out and powered it into the bottom corner at the near post. Napoli and Roma Set Sights on Lucca as Udinese Names Their Price
arts.sum: Lorenzo Lucca, the rising star of Italian football, has become the center of attention for several top clubs in Serie A. After fending off interest during the January transfer window, Udinese has made it clear they are open to negotiations for their prized striker come the end of the season. arts.sum: AS Roma travel to take on FC Porto in the Europa League’s play-off round this evening. The two teams started the season among the favourites for success in this competition but missed out on automatic qualification to the Round of 16.
